converted from EAD 1.0 to EAD 2002 >>>>>>> 2e3ec5c57314077b8435567632a49d313357daab
English
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections
Larry Palmer papers
Palmer, Larry I., 1944-
18-2-3249
36.3 cubic feet. 36.3 cubic feet.
1972-2011. Correspondence, memoranda, professional writings, and lectures. Includes correspondence, memoranda, professional writings, and lectures concerning Professor Palmer's 27 years at the Cornell Law School, especially his work on the procedure and substance of legal interference in the medical field and issues concerning medical ethics. Collection material in English 4499663
General
Contact Information:
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu
Compiled by:
Eileen Keating
Date completed:
March 2003
EAD encoding:
Martin Heggestad, July 2003Fredrika Loew, October 2011
Date modified:
RMC Staff, August 2018
BIOGRAPHICAL NOTE
Professor, Cornell Law School, 1975-2002.
SERIES LIST
Boxes 20, 21
Cite As:
Larry Palmer papers, #18-2-3249. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.
Scope and content
Includes correspondence, memoranda, professional writings, and lectures concerning Professor Palmer's 27 years at the Cornell Law School, especially his work on the procedure and substance of legal interference in the medical field and issues concerning medical ethics. Also includes additional files from his work at the University of Louisville and at William and Mary, including courses on public health, health law policy, and bioethics, as well as books, articles, and CDs.
Law -- Study and teaching -- United States. Medical care -- United States. Medical ethics -- United States. Cornell Law School -- : Faculty.

Scope and Contents
Publications include but are not limited to: The Journal of Criminal Law and Criminology, The New Yorker, University of Pennsylvania Law Review, and the Georgetown Journal on Poverty Law and Policy.Digital Media Files38
Scope and Contents
Includes Cornell Teaching and Provost Files, various presentations, and research and correspondenceLarry I. Palmer Writer & Speaker website
Larry I. Palmer Writer & Speaker website [Delivery]Series X. Audio Visual MaterialCornell Medical and Cornell Law, Physician Assisted Suicide, Legal and Ethical and Medical Issues, Larry Palmer, Joe Fins, Suzanne Stonsaas1 CD20Michigan vs Jack Kevorkian case, recordings from the trial14 tapes1993Microcassette20Court TV coverage of the Michigan vs Jack Kevorkian trial. Scope and Contents
Publications include but are not limited to: The Journal of Criminal Law and Criminology, The New Yorker, University of Pennsylvania Law Review, and the Georgetown Journal on Poverty Law and Policy.Digital Media Files38
Scope and Contents
Includes Cornell Teaching and Provost Files, various presentations, and research and correspondenceLarry I. Palmer Writer & Speaker website
